result.warning_text: Access denied. You do not have permission to view this. For more on scraping GitHub and how it may affect your rights, please review our Terms of Service

notes: Prompt submitted successfully. GitHub Copilot displayed 'Access denied' error in yellow warning banner instead of expected APF warning text. This appears to be Etap block causing GitHub's own error handling to kick in rather than rendering the APF warning text directly. The response shows blocked=true behavior but the warning text is GitHub's generic 'Access denied / Terms of Service' message, not the APF '보안 정책' text. Loading spinner remained visible below the error. Expected text '보안 정책' was NOT displayed.
